description: Address review findings: refactor tailscaleFunnelRuntime.ts to use @axonrouter/data-dir abstraction, add build script for tunnel package, rebuild dist/, and add port constant comments.
steps: Refactor tailscaleFunnelRuntime.ts to remove os/path imports and use resolveDataPath from @axonrouter/data-dir
Add build script and tsconfig.build.json to packages/tunnel
Add port constant comments in tunnelConnectionRuntime.ts and tunnelManager.ts
acceptance_criteria: tailscaleFunnelRuntime.ts uses resolveDataPath instead of path.join(os.homedir()...)
dist/ files are in sync with source
npm run build produces 0 NFT warnings
